expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度]是总测量值, [板厚] 是顶部、底部和侧面板的材料厚度, [背板厚度] 是背板的材料厚度(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] represent total measurements. [Board Thickness] is the material thickness for the top, bottom, and side boards. [Back Board Thickness] is the material thickness for the back board.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Lebar], [Tinggi], [Kedalaman] adalah ukuran keseluruhan. [Ketebalan Papan] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan atas, bawah, dan sisi. [Ketebalan Belakang Papan] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan belakang (AI translated, please check).
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Lebar], [Tinggi], [Kedalaman] adalah total ukuran. [Ketebalan Papan] adalah ketebalan material papan atas, bawah, dan samping. [Ketebalan Papan Belakang] adalah ketebalan material papan belakang (AI translated, please check).
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [ความกว้าง], [ความสูง], [ความลึก] คือขนาดทั้งหมด [ความหนาของแผ่นไม้] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผงด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง [ความหนาของแผ่นหลัง] คือความหนาของแผ่นหลังของวัสดุ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước ván cho tủ. [Chiều rộng], [Chiều cao], [Chiều sâu] là tổng kích thước. [Độ dày ván] là độ dày vật liệu cho ván trên, dưới và bên. [Độ dày ván sau] là độ dày vật liệu cho ván sau (AI translated, please check).
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa kabinet. Ang [Lapad], [Taas], [Lalim] ay mga kabuuang sukat. Ang [Kapal ng Tabla] ay ang kapal ng materyal para sa itaas, ilalim, at magkabilang gilid na mga tabla. Ang [Kapal ng Likod na Tabla] ay ang kapal ng materyal para sa likod na tabla (AI translated, please check).
